task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the hardware assets page and reviews purchase dates and warranty months to identify expired assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Snipe-IT hardware assets list or individual asset details being viewed, specifically checking the purchase date and warranty months against the 2025-03-06 audit date.

task_completion.description: Agent changes the status of expired warranty assets to 'Pending'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the asset edit screen with the status dropdown set to 'Pending' for an expired asset, or the asset list showing the updated 'Pending' status for these assets.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the required compliance note to the expired warranty assets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the asset edit screen with the Notes field containing 'WARRANTY EXPIRED - Renewal or replacement required per compliance policy FIN-IT-2025-Q1'.

task_completion.description: Agent does not modify assets with active warranties (e.g., ASSET-W004).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that assets with active warranties (where purchase date + warranty months is after 2025-03-06) are skipped and not edited, retaining their original status and notes.

task_completion.description: Agent does not modify assets that are already retired, lost, or stolen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that assets with statuses like 'Retired', 'Lost', or 'Stolen' are skipped and not edited.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Snipe-IT web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Snipe-IT web application forms rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely updated the assets one by one or via bulk edit in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual edit screens, dropdown selections, and save actions being performed in the browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM text to appear as if the task is completed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The audit date is 2025-03-06. Expired assets are those where the purchase date plus warranty months is before 2025-03-06. The expected note must contain 'WARRANTY EXPIRED'. The target status for expired assets is 'Pending'. Active warranty assets (e.g., ASSET-W004) and retired/lost/stolen assets must not be modified.
